link.name: Pathfinder #200: Seven Dooms for Sandpoint pg. 183
link.alt: Pathfinder #200: Seven Dooms for Sandpoint pg. 183

stat_block.text: The *Ghost Stone* is a stationary magic item, a 10-foot-long spindle-shaped crystal floating and slowly rotating within a hemispherical chamber in the Pit (area **E10**). If moved from this chamber, the *Ghost Stone* is destroyed. It can also be destroyed via damage (AC 28, Hardness 16, HP 60). If it's destroyed, the trapped Varisian spirits within are finally released; as a vortex of vaguely humanoid shapes swirls around the room, all PCs in area **E10** are filled with sensations of elation and freedom. The departing ghosts grant each PC the first activation result below, but after that, the *Ghost Stone* crashes to the ground and shatters into mundane crystal, forever destroyed.

traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Divination
traits.text: The divination school of magic typically involves obtaining or transferring information, or predicting events.

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: The  *Ghost Stone* grants a terrifying vision of doom. For the PCs, this vision is of seven apocalyptic dooms that descend upon Sandpoint.

abilities.name: Activate
abilities.effect: The  *Ghost Stone* casts  *read omens* to your specifications.
